---
title: "Journals of Expeditions of Discovery into Central Australia, and overland from Adelaide to King George’s Sound, in 1840-1"
---

## Journals of Expeditions of Discovery into Central Australia, and overland from Adelaide to King George’s Sound, in 1840-1

**Author:** Edward John Eyre
**Date:** 1845
**Imprint:** London: Boone

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
